moments.title: England vs Ghana in World Cup Group Stage
moments.blurb: England continues their FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign against Ghana in the group stage on Tuesday, June 23rd.

angles.name: Match Build-up
angles.copy: Big game for the Three Lions! England take on Ghana in their second World Cup group match this Tuesday. Who's feeling confident? #FIFAWorldCup

angles.name: Fan Excitement
angles.copy: Get ready for Tuesday! England vs Ghana, 9pm kick-off. Where are you watching the game? 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿⚽️

moments.title: England vs Panama Final Group Match
moments.blurb: England wraps up their FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage matches facing Panama on Saturday, June 27th.

angles.name: Group Decider
angles.copy: Will England secure their spot in the knockouts? Their final group game is against Panama this Saturday. Crucial points up for grabs! #FIFAWorldCup

angles.name: Weekend Football
angles.copy: Saturday night is World Cup night! England vs Panama at 10pm. What's your score prediction?

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships Begin
moments.blurb: The prestigious Wimbledon Championships 2026 kick off on Monday, June 29th, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to London.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 starts a week on Monday. Who are you backing for the title this year? 🎾 #Wimbledon

angles.name: London Buzz
angles.copy: London is gearing up for two weeks of elite tennis as Wimbledon begins on June 29th. The buzz around SW19 is already building! #WimbledonLondon

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Closes Today
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival concludes today, Sunday, June 21st, with headliners The Cure, The Kooks, David Gray, and Level 42.

angles.name: Festival Wrap-up
angles.copy: Last day of the Isle of Wight Festival! Who's catching The Cure, The Kooks or David Gray today? Send us your highlights! #IOW2026

angles.name: Sunday Headliners
angles.copy: The Cure, The Kooks, David Gray, Level 42 – what a lineup to close out the Isle of Wight Festival today! What's been your favourite set?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Concludes in Glasgow
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green hosts the final day of TRNSMT Festival today, Sunday, June 21st, featuring Lewis Capaldi, Amy Macdonald, and Two Door Cinema Club.

angles.name: Glasgow Finale
angles.copy: It's the final day of TRNSMT in Glasgow! Who's ready for Lewis Capaldi to close out the festival? What a weekend it's been! #TRNSMT2026

angles.name: Sunday's Best
angles.copy: Lewis Capaldi, Amy Macdonald, Two Door Cinema Club – TRNSMT finishes with a bang today! Any wild stories from Glasgow Green? #TRNSMT

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival Begins
moments.blurb: The inaugural Blenheim Palace Festival starts Saturday, June 27th, bringing major artists like Katy Perry, Alanis Morissette, and Pete Tong Ibiza Classics to Oxfordshire.

angles.name: New Festival Excitement
angles.copy: A brand new festival is coming! Blenheim Palace Festival kicks off next Saturday with Katy Perry, Alanis Morissette & Pete Tong. Who's heading there? #BlenheimPalaceFestival

angles.name: Palace Setting
angles.copy: Imagine seeing Katy Perry or Alanis Morissette perform at Blenheim Palace! The new festival starts next weekend. What a setting for live music!

moments.title: State Fayre Festival in Essex
moments.blurb: The UK's biggest music & BBQ festival, State Fayre, takes over Hylands Park, Chelmsford from June 26-28, with Kings of Leon, Alanis Morissette, and The Lumineers headlining.

angles.name: Music & BBQ
angles.copy: Kings of Leon, Alanis Morissette, The Lumineers AND BBQ? State Fayre Festival in Chelmsford starts next Friday. Sounds like a perfect weekend! #StateFayre

angles.name: Essex Event
angles.copy: Essex is getting ready for State Fayre Festival next weekend! Three days of huge music and delicious food at Hylands Park. Who's going?

moments.title: The Agency Season 2 Premieres
moments.blurb: The political thriller 'The Agency' returns for its second season, premiering today, June 21st, on Paramount+.

angles.name: New Season Drop
angles.copy: Your Sunday binge-watch sorted! The Agency Season 2 drops today on Paramount+. Get ready for more espionage and intrigue. #TheAgency

angles.name: Weekend Watch
angles.copy: Looking for something to watch this Sunday? Season 2 of The Agency is out now! Who's excited to dive back into the spy world?

moments.title: House Of The Dragon Season 3 Starts
moments.blurb: Season 3 of the Game of Thrones prequel 'House Of The Dragon' begins streaming on Monday, June 22nd, on Sky Atlantic and HBO Max.

angles.name: Fantasy Return
angles.copy: Dragons are back! House Of The Dragon Season 3 premieres tomorrow on Sky Atlantic and HBO Max. Whose side are you on? #HouseOfTheDragon

angles.name: Monday Night TV
angles.copy: Mark your calendars for Monday! House Of The Dragon Season 3 is here. Get ready for more Westeros drama! 🐉🔥

moments.title: Happy 73rd to Cyndi Lauper!
moments.blurb: The iconic pop singer Cyndi Lauper, known for 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'Time After Time', turns 73 tomorrow, June 22nd.

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Girls (and guys) just want to celebrate! Happy 73rd birthday tomorrow to the incredible Cyndi Lauper. What's your favourite Cyndi track?

angles.name: Timeless Hits
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 73rd Birthday for tomorrow to the one and only Cyndi Lauper! Her music is truly timeless. #ClassicHits

moments.title: Todd Rundgren Turns 78
moments.blurb: Musician and acclaimed producer Todd Rundgren celebrates his 78th birthday tomorrow, June 22nd.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday for tomorrow to the innovative Todd Rundgren! A true rock legend and influential producer. #ToddRundgren

angles.name: Musical Genius
angles.copy: From solo hits to producing classics like 'Bat Out of Hell', Todd Rundgren turns 78 tomorrow! What's your favourite of his works?

moments.title: Jason Mraz is 49!
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Jason Mraz, known for hits like 'I'm Yours', celebrates his 49th birthday on Monday, June 23rd.

angles.name: Happy Birthday
angles.copy: It's Jason Mraz's 49th birthday on Monday! We're celebrating with 'I'm Yours' all day. What's your favourite Jason Mraz song?

angles.name: Feel-Good Vibes
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 49th Birthday to the always positive Jason Mraz on Monday! His music always brings a smile. 😊 #EasyListening

moments.title: Ariana Grande Turns 33
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande celebrates her 33rd birthday on Thursday, June 26th.

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the incredible Ariana Grande this Thursday! Celebrate with her biggest hits all day. 🎂 #ArianaGrande

angles.name: Celebrating Ariana
angles.copy: From Nickelodeon to global sensation! Ariana Grande turns 33 on Thursday. What's your all-time favourite Ariana track?

moments.title: Chris Isaak's 70th Birthday
moments.blurb: The distinctive rockabilly singer Chris Isaak, known for 'Wicked Game', turns 70 on Thursday, June 26th.

angles.name: Wicked Game
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday to the iconic Chris Isaak this Thursday! Time to put 'Wicked Game' on repeat. 🎸 #ChrisIsaak

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: The smooth voice of Chris Isaak turns 70 on Thursday! Wishing him a very Happy Birthday. What's your favourite love song from him? #LoveSongs

moments.title: Wrexham Football Museum Opens This Month
moments.blurb: The brand-new Wrexham Football Museum is set to open in June 2026, celebrating the town's extraordinary rise in football.

angles.name: Wrexham Pride
angles.copy: It's opening this month! The new Wrexham Football Museum is ready to celebrate the town's amazing story. Go on, Reds! #Wrexham

angles.name: Football History
angles.copy: A must-visit for any football fan! The Wrexham Football Museum opens its doors this June. What's your favourite Wrexham memory? #DragonRadio

moments.title: Teignmouth Folk Festival Ends Today
moments.blurb: The Teignmouth Folk Festival concludes its run today, Sunday, June 21st, with music and dancing across various venues in the Devon town.

angles.name: Devon Folk Fun
angles.copy: It's the last day of Teignmouth Folk Festival! Head down for traditional music and dancing to wrap up a fantastic weekend in Devon. #Teignmouth

angles.name: Festival Farewell
angles.copy: Farewell to the Teignmouth Folk Festival as it finishes today! Hope everyone enjoyed the vibrant atmosphere and great music. #FolkFestival

moments.title: Dartmoor Classic Bike Ride Today
moments.blurb: The challenging Dartmoor Classic Bike Ride Sportive takes place today, Sunday, June 21st, with three routes across the stunning Dartmoor landscape.

angles.name: Cycling Challenge
angles.copy: Good luck to all riders tackling the Dartmoor Classic Bike Ride today! Three gruelling routes across our beautiful Dartmoor. You've got this! 🚴‍♂️ #DartmoorClassic

angles.name: Sunday Ride
angles.copy: Pedal power on Dartmoor today! The Dartmoor Classic is underway. Shout out to everyone taking part in this epic cycling event. #Devon

moments.title: Exeter World Cup Fan Park: England vs Ghana
moments.blurb: Exeter hosts a World Cup Fan Park at Level 33 Open Air Rooftop Venue And Club for England's match against Ghana on Tuesday, June 23rd.

angles.name: Local Fan Zone
angles.copy: Cheer on England in style! Exeter's Level 33 rooftop is hosting a World Cup Fan Park for the Ghana game this Tuesday. Get involved! 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿⚽️ #Exeter

angles.name: Match Day Plan
angles.copy: Planning your Tuesday night? Exeter has a World Cup Fan Park ready for the England vs Ghana match! Where will you be watching?

moments.title: Princesshay Go Wild Trail in Exeter
moments.blurb: The Princesshay Go Wild trail, featuring various animal sculptures, is running daily in Exeter city centre until June 30th.

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: Still time to explore the Princesshay Go Wild trail in Exeter! Find all the animal sculptures before June 30th. Perfect for a family day out! #Exeter

angles.name: City Centre Activity
angles.copy: Spotting all the animals on the Princesshay Go Wild trail in Exeter? It's on until the end of the month – a great way to see the city! #Devon

moments.title: Colour Exhibition at RAMM Exeter
moments.blurb: The vibrant 'Colour' exhibition at the Royal Albert Memorial Museum (RAMM) in Exeter continues daily until September 6th.

angles.name: Art & Culture
angles.copy: Immerse yourself in 'Colour' at RAMM Exeter! This fascinating exhibition runs all summer. A brilliant cultural day out in the city. #RAMM

angles.name: Summer Exhibition
angles.copy: Looking for something inspiring to do in Exeter? The 'Colour' exhibition at RAMM is a must-see this summer! #VisitExeter
